1.0.11.en: Bug fix: EU users no longer get a 401/4010 authentication error when using a refresh token as password. The app now correctly exchanges the refresh token for an access token, bypassing the reCAPTCHA-blocked login flow.

1.0.1.en: Initial release. Lock/unlock, climate control, charging and battery monitoring for your Kia vehicle. Supports EU, US, CA and AU regions.
